name: atlas-root
description: ATLAS MVP-0: local Knowledge Compiler and Artificial Mind Format

scripts.build: tsc -b packages/types packages/graph packages/privacy packages/migration packages/memory packages/security packages/tools packages/agents packages/context packages/compiler packages/kernel packages/mcp packages/reasoning packages/runtime packages/cli apps/playground apps/codex-assistant
scripts.clean: tsc -b --clean packages/types packages/graph packages/privacy packages/migration packages/memory packages/security packages/tools packages/agents packages/context packages/compiler packages/kernel packages/mcp packages/reasoning packages/runtime packages/cli apps/playground apps/codex-assistant
